---
title: "IRB Briefing for Juliann Allen & Jon Murphy"
author: "Dr. Christopher Castille"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
    latex_engine: xelatex
header-includes:
  - \usepackage[margin=1in]{geometry}
  - \usepackage{fontspec}
  - \setmainfont{Times New Roman}
  - \usepackage{setspace}
  - \singlespacing
  - \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
  - \setlength{\parskip}{6pt}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(jsonlite)
# Read JSON (same directory as this Rmd)
json_path <- "IRB_BRIEFING_JULIANN_JON.json"
b <- read_json(json_path, simplifyVector = FALSE)
```

# `r b$meta$title`

**Date:** `r b$meta$date`  
**Purpose:** `r b$meta$purpose`

---

## Project Documents (IRB Applications)

```{r project-docs}
for (row in b$project_documents) {
  cat("**", row$study, "** | ", row$document, " | ", row$location, "\n\n", sep = "")
}
```

---

## Studies Proposed for Review

```{r studies}
for (s in b$studies) {
  cat("### ", s$id, ". ", s$name, " — ", s$subtitle)
  if (!is.null(s$status)) cat(" *(", s$status, ")*", sep = "")
  cat("\n\n")
  for (f in s$fields) {
    cat("- **", f$label, ":** ", f$value, "\n", sep = "")
  }
  if (!is.null(s$request)) {
    cat("\n**Request:** ", s$request, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }
  if (!is.null(s$change)) {
    cat("**Change:** ", s$change, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }
  if (!is.null(s$lai_link)) {
    cat("**LAI link:** ", s$lai_link, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }
  if (!is.null(s$procedures)) {
    cat("**Procedures:** ", s$procedures, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }
  if (!is.null(s$note)) {
    cat("**Note:** ", s$note, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }
  if (!is.null(s$suggested_reviewers)) {
    cat("**Suggested reviewers:** ", s$suggested_reviewers, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }
  cat("---\n\n")
}
```

---

## Issues to Be Aware Of

```{r issues}
for (row in b$issues) {
  cat("- **", row$study, ":** ", row$issue, "\n", sep = "")
}
```

---

## Access

- **Admin:** `r b$access$admin`
- **Researcher dashboard:** `r b$access$researcher_dashboard`

---

## Full IRB Documents (for review)

```{r full-docs}
for (d in b$full_documents) {
  cat("- ", d, "\n", sep = "")
}
```

---

*Contact: `r b$meta$contact$name` — `r b$meta$contact$email` | `r b$meta$contact$phone`*
